title: Hedorah, the first yellow supergiant Kaiju star candidate at $z\approx3$ revealed by behind AS1063
comment: 12 pages plus appenidx. 10 figures. Submitted to Astronomy and Astrophysics
summary: We present a new free-form lens model for the $z=0.348$ galaxy cluster AS1063, based on previously spectroscopically confirmed lensed galaxies and new images from the GLIMPSE program. We use the ultra-deep data to identify new counterimages for previously confirmed (spectroscopically) lensed systems. We use the full set of spectroscopically confirmed systems to derive a new lens model, which is later used to confirm many of the previous lensed system candidates and discover new lensed system candidates in the images. We compute the geometric redshifts, time delays, and magnification for all counterimages (confirmed and not confirmed). Among the new systems we find a peculiar multiply lensed galaxy with a strong emission line at $\approx 4\, μ$m that likely corresponds to H$-β$ and/or OIII at $z\approx 7.5$. This galaxy could be a little-red-dot or an extreme emission line galaxy. We also identify a yellow supergiant lensed star candidate at $z\approx 3.1$. This star shows some similarities with previous Kaiju stars and we nickname it "Hedorah", in honor of the famous yellow-eyed Kaiju. Previous lensed stars at $z>0.1$ are either blue supergiants or red supergiants, making Hedorah the first yellow supergiant discovered beyond $z=0.1$ and confirming that, despite their rarity, they can also be found at these redshifts. Since many Cepheid stars are yellow supergiants, we consider the possibility that Hedorah could also be the first Cepheid discovered at cosmological distances, but we conclude that Hedorah is more likely a hypergiant yellow star approaching the end of its life. Alternatively, Hedorah could be a small group of stars, although this is less likely based on Hedorah's peculiar colors and additionally may require the more exotic fuzzy dark matter to help explain the lack of counterimage.

AI.tldr: 研究人员利用GLIMPSE项目的深度图像数据，为AS1063星系团建立了新的自由形式透镜模型，发现了新的透镜星系候选体，包括一个可能位于z≈7.5的奇特多重透镜星系和一个在z≈3.1的黄色超巨星候选体"Hedorah"。
AI.motivation: 利用GLIMPSE项目的超深度图像数据改进AS1063星系团的透镜模型，通过识别新的透镜星系候选体来更好地理解星系团的质量分布，并探索高红移宇宙中的特殊天体。
AI.method: 使用先前光谱确认的透镜星系和GLIMPSE项目的新图像数据，识别先前确认透镜系统的新对应像，基于完整的光谱确认系统建立新的透镜模型，然后用该模型确认先前的透镜系统候选体并发现新的候选体。
AI.result: 建立了AS1063星系团的新透镜模型，发现了新的透镜系统候选体，包括一个在≈4μm处有强发射线的奇特多重透镜星系（可能对应z≈7.5的H-β和/或OIII线），以及一个在z≈3.1的黄色超巨星候选体"Hedorah"。计算了所有对应像的几何红移、时间延迟和放大倍数。
AI.conclusion: 新透镜模型成功识别了多个新的透镜系统候选体，特别是发现了第一个在z>0.1的黄色超巨星"Hedorah"，这扩展了我们对高红移宇宙中恒星类型的认识。虽然Hedorah可能是造父变星，但更可能是一个接近生命末期的超巨星黄色星。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们为红移z=0.348的星系团AS1063提出了一个新的自由形式透镜模型，该模型基于先前光谱证认的透镜星系和GLIMPSE项目的新图像。我们利用超深数据为先前光谱证认的透镜系统识别新的对应像。我们使用全套光谱证认的系统推导出一个新的透镜模型，该模型随后用于确认许多先前的透镜系统候选体，并在图像中发现新的透镜系统候选体。我们计算了所有对应像（已确认和未确认）的几何红移、时间延迟和放大率。在新系统中，我们发现了一个奇特的多重透镜星系，其在约4微米处有一条强发射线，很可能对应于红移z≈7.5处的H-β和/或OIII。这个星系可能是一个小红点或极端发射线星系。我们还识别出一个红移z≈3.1的黄色超巨星透镜恒星候选体。这颗恒星与之前的Kaiju恒星有一些相似之处，我们将其昵称为“Hedorah”，以纪念著名的黄眼Kaiju。此前红移z>0.1的透镜恒星要么是蓝超巨星，要么是红超巨星，这使得Hedorah成为在z>0.1之外发现的第一颗黄色超巨星，并证实尽管它们罕见，但在这些红移处也能找到。由于许多造父变星是黄色超巨星，我们考虑了Hedorah也可能是第一颗在宇宙学距离上发现的造父变星的可能性，但我们得出结论，Hedorah更可能是一颗接近生命末期的黄色超巨星。或者，Hedorah可能是一个小星群，尽管根据Hedorah独特的颜色，这种可能性较小，并且可能还需要更奇异的模糊暗物质来解释对应像的缺失。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，新透镜模型成功识别了多个新的透镜系统候选体，特别是发现了第一个在z>0.1的黄色超巨星"Hedorah"，这扩展了我们对高红移宇宙中恒星类型的认识。虽然Hedorah可能是造父变星，但更可能是一个接近生命末期的超巨星黄色星。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Central region of AS1063 ( \(2^{\prime}.25\times 2^{\prime}.25\) ) combining 12 HST and JWST filters (range 0.4–5 micron). Yellow dots show the spectroscopically confirmed lensing constraints, or rank A constraints (see Table LABEL:tab_arcs ), used to derive the lens model. Cyan dots show the rank B constraints (Table LABEL:tab_arcs ) not used in the lens model but highly consistent with it and for which we also derive geometric redshifts, time delays and magnification. The critical curve correponds to \(z_{s}=3\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1: AS1063的中心区域 ( \(2^{\prime}.25\times 2^{\prime}.25\) )，结合了12个HST和JWST滤光片（范围0.4–5微米）。黄色点表示用于推导透镜模型的光谱证认透镜约束，或A级约束（见表LABEL:tab_arcs）。青色点表示B级约束（表LABEL:tab_arcs），未用于透镜模型但与模型高度一致，我们也为其推导了几何红移、时间延迟和放大率。临界曲线对应于 \(z_{s}=3\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Mass profile in the central region of AS1063 and centered on the BCG. The projected mass from the lens model is shown in black (in units of \(\kappa=\Sigma/\Sigma_{crit}\) at \(z_{s}=3\) ) with the two blue vertical dotted lines marking the range of distances with lensing constraints. The red line shows a NFW profile with parameters shown in the top right corner.
figures.caption_zh: 图2: AS1063中心区域并以BCG为中心的质量分布。透镜模型投影质量以黑色显示（单位为 \(\kappa=\Sigma/\Sigma_{crit}\) 在 \(z_{s}=3\) 处），两条蓝色垂直虚线标记了具有透镜约束的距离范围。红线显示了NFW轮廓，参数显示在右上角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The giant arc in the north west. Lack of counterimages for this arc and large magnification can be explained only if the arc lies in a narrow redshift range around \(z=1.85\) . The critical curve for this redshift is shown as a yellow curve, and in white for a slightly larger redshift of \(z=1.9\) , or red for \(z=3\) , where counterimages start to form. The predicted magnification at different points along the giant arc is marked with yellow arrows and numbers. The source plane reconstruction is shown in the bottom-right corner. The entire arc delenses into a merging galaxy system less than 1” in length. South of the giant arc the lens model predicts another unconfirmed system to be at \(z\approx 3\) (white ellipses) with two symmetric images on each side of the critical curve at \(z=3\) (red curve).
figures.caption_zh: 图3: 西北方向的巨弧。该弧缺乏对应像且放大率很大，只有当弧位于 \(z=1.85\) 附近的窄红移范围内时才能解释。该红移的临界曲线以黄色曲线显示，略大红移 \(z=1.9\) 以白色显示，或 \(z=3\) 以红色显示，此时对应像开始形成。沿巨弧不同点的预测放大率以黄色箭头和数字标记。源平面重建显示在右下角。整个弧解透镜为一个长度小于1角秒的合并星系系统。在巨弧以南，透镜模型预测另一个未确认系统位于 \(z\approx 3\) （白色椭圆），在 \(z=3\) （红色曲线）临界曲线两侧各有两个对称像。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Color image of the caustic crossing arc at \(z=0.73\) (system 19). The top panel shows the color image after combining F090W, F150W and F200W. The bottom image is a color version using a high-pass filter version image of the same three bands. We show the cluster CC at \(z=0.73\) as a white curve and mark with circles two regions near the CC where distinctively redder sources are found. The yellow ellipse shows a region where the macromodel magnification alone exceeds 700. The parity of the images is indicated in the bottom panel with plus and minus symbols.
figures.caption_zh: 图4: 红移 \(z=0.73\) 处焦散线穿越弧（系统19）的彩色图像。上图显示了结合F090W、F150W和F200W后的彩色图像。下图是使用相同三个波段的高通滤波版本图像的彩色版本。我们将 \(z=0.73\) 处的星团CC显示为白色曲线，并用圆圈标记了CC附近两个明显更红源所在的区域。黄色椭圆显示了一个宏模型放大率单独超过700的区域。下图中的加号和减号表示像的奇偶性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Multiply lensed ELG (new system 78) found after searching for high-z lensed galaxies near the \(z=10\) CC. The galaxy is not detected in F090W and shows prominent emission in F410M. The three counterimages are consistent in color an predicted position if \(z\approx 7.5\) . The predicted magnification at this redshift is also consistent with the flux ratio specially if one accounts for the possibly biased low magnification of image c. At this redshift, the emission observed in F410M would correspond to H \(\beta\) –OIII.
figures.caption_zh: 图5: 在 \(z=10\) CC附近搜索高红移透镜星系后发现的多重透镜ELG（新系统78）。该星系在F090W中未被探测到，但在F410M中显示出显著的发射。如果 \(z\approx 7.5\) ，三个对应像在颜色和预测位置上一致。该红移处的预测放大率也与流量比一致，特别是考虑到像c可能偏低的放大率。在此红移处，F410M中观测到的发射将对应于H \(\beta\) –OIII。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Hedorah, marked with an H, a candidate microlensing event of a lensed yellow supergiant star at \(z\approx 3.1\) . The color image shows the combination F090W+F150W+F200W. The white line marks the CC at \(z=3.1\) . The green circle labeled G1 is a possible clump in the lensed galaxy, but more consistent with being a GC in AS1063. The remaining green circles show eight randomly selected GCs used to derive their photometry and compare it with Hedorah’s (see Fig. 7 )
figures.caption_zh: 图6: Hedorah，标记为H，是一个红移 \(z\approx 3.1\) 处透镜黄色超巨星恒星的候选微引力透镜事件。彩色图像显示了F090W+F150W+F200W的组合。白线标记了 \(z=3.1\) 处的CC。标记为G1的绿色圆圈是透镜星系中的一个可能团块，但更可能是AS1063中的一个球状星团。其余绿色圆圈显示了八个随机选择的球状星团，用于推导它们的光度测量并与Hedorah进行比较（见图7）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: SED of the lensed star candidate Hedorah. Four stellar models with different temperatures and at slightly different redshifts are shown (from Coelho, 2014 ) . The data is consistent with a yellow supergiant star with temperature 6500 K at \(z=3.1\) . The inset shows the SED of unresolved GCs nearby and the bright clumps 60.a and 60.b. The difference in magnitude between 60.1 and 60.b ( \(\approx 0.7\) mags) is consistent with the difference in magnification predicted by the lens model (0.65 mags).
figures.caption_zh: 图7: 透镜恒星候选体Hedorah的SED。显示了四个不同温度且红移略有不同的恒星模型（来自Coelho, 2014）。数据与红移 \(z=3.1\) 处温度6500 K的黄色超巨星一致。插图显示了附近未分辨球状星团和明亮团块60.a和60.b的SED。60.1和60.b之间的星等差（ \(\approx 0.7\) 星等）与透镜模型预测的放大率差（0.65星等）一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Caustics of a compact \(10^{4}\,{M}_{\odot}\) millilens in the lens near the CC. A small \(R=0.5\) pc cluster of stars is shown (in projection) by the millilens caustic on the side of the CC with positive parity (left) and negative parity (right). Typical magnification factors, \(\mu\) , are marked.
figures.caption_zh: 图8: 透镜中靠近CC的一个致密 \(10^{4}\,{M}_{\odot}\) 毫透镜的焦散线。一个小的 \(R=0.5\) pc恒星团（投影）由毫透镜焦散线显示在CC正奇偶性侧（左）和负奇偶性侧（右）。典型放大因子 \(\mu\) 已标记。

title: The Characteristic Mass and Energy Conversion Efficiency in the Cusp-Core Transition of Dark Matter Haloes: Implications for Scaling Relations and Supernova feedbacks
summary: Galaxies in the nearby Universe, particularly dwarf systems, exhibit inner mass profiles of dark matter haloes that systematically depart from canonical cold dark matter expectations, signalling an interplay between baryonic feedback and the collisionless halo. We update an analytical cusp-core transition model by incorporating the effect of supernova-driven mass loss. Adapting this model to SPARC galaxies, we measure the energy conversion efficiency epsilon, defined as the fraction of supernova feedback energy that is used to change the central dark-matter potential. We find epsilon ~ 0.01 for nearby SPARC galaxies. Building on these measurements, we compare the dynamical energy required for a cusp-core transformation with the feedback energy available over burst cycles and identify a cusp-core transition forbidden region on the halo-stellar mass plane where transformation cannot occur. Galaxies with halo masses from 10^8 to 10^11 M_sun lie outside the forbidden region, whereas ultra-faint dwarf galaxies < 10^8 M_sun, galaxy groups and clusters > 10^11 M_sun fall within it, consistent with their high central densities and the inefficiency of core formation at very low and very high masses. This approach also explains the observed diversity of inner density profiles in low-mass systems, showing that both the star formation rate and the energy conversion efficiency govern them, with the latter emerging as a key parameter setting the strength of the cusp-core transition. Beyond the cusp-core problem, our observationally inferred energy conversion efficiency provides a model independent benchmark that strongly constrains galaxy formation models.

AI.tldr: 该研究更新了暗物质晕的尖峰-核心转变模型，通过结合超新星驱动的质量损失效应，测量了超新星反馈能量转化为改变中心暗物质势能的效率，并识别出无法发生尖峰-核心转变的禁止区域。
AI.motivation: 附近宇宙中的星系，特别是矮星系，显示出暗物质晕的内部质量分布与标准冷暗物质预期存在系统性偏离，这表明重子反馈与无碰撞晕之间存在相互作用。需要理解这种尖峰-核心转变的物理机制。
AI.method: 更新了分析性的尖峰-核心转变模型，加入了超新星驱动的质量损失效应。将该模型应用于SPARC星系，测量能量转换效率ε（超新星反馈能量中用于改变中心暗物质势能的比例）。通过比较尖峰-核心转变所需的动力学能量与爆发周期中可用的反馈能量，识别出无法发生转变的禁止区域。
AI.result: 发现附近SPARC星系的能量转换效率ε约为0.01。识别出尖峰-核心转变的禁止区域：晕质量在10^8到10^11 M_sun之间的星系位于禁止区域外，而超微弱矮星系（<10^8 M_sun）、星系群和星系团（>10^11 M_sun）则落在禁止区域内，这与它们的高中心密度和极低/极高质量下核心形成效率低下一致。该模型还能解释低质量系统中内部密度分布的多样性。
AI.conclusion: 尖峰-核心转变由恒星形成率和能量转换效率共同决定，其中能量转换效率是决定转变强度的关键参数。观测推断的能量转换效率为星系形成模型提供了模型独立的基准，对这些模型形成了强约束。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为暗物质晕尖峰-核心转变与超新星反馈，与用户画像中的dark matter、halo、dwarf galaxies、scaling relations等关键词匹配，但未涉及强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学或用户核心作者，且方法为解析模型与SPARC样本，非用户主要兴趣方向。

recommendation.method_fit: 低匹配，使用解析模型和SPARC样本，非用户常用的透镜或高分辨率观测方法。
recommendation.author_fit: 无匹配，作者不在用户核心作者列表中。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 近邻宇宙中的星系，特别是矮星系系统，其暗物质晕的内部质量分布系统地偏离了标准冷暗物质模型的预期，这表明重子反馈与无碰撞晕之间存在相互作用。我们通过纳入超新星驱动的质量损失效应，更新了一个解析的尖峰-核心转变模型。将该模型应用于SPARC星系，我们测量了能量转换效率ε，其定义为用于改变中心暗物质势能的超新星反馈能量比例。我们发现近邻SPARC星系的ε约为0.01。基于这些测量，我们将尖峰-核心转变所需的动力学能量与爆发周期内可用的反馈能量进行比较，并在晕-恒星质量平面上识别出一个转变无法发生的尖峰-核心转变禁区。晕质量在10^8到10^11 M_sun范围内的星系位于禁区之外，而质量小于10^8 M_sun的超暗矮星系以及质量大于10^11 M_sun的星系群和星系团则落在禁区内，这与它们的高中心密度以及在极低和极高质量下核心形成效率低下的观测结果一致。该方法还解释了低质量系统中内部密度分布的观测多样性，表明恒星形成率和能量转换效率共同决定了这些分布，其中后者成为设定尖峰-核心转变强度的关键参数。超越尖峰-核心问题，我们通过观测推断出的能量转换效率为星系形成模型提供了一个与模型无关的基准，并对其形成了强约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，尖峰-核心转变由恒星形成率和能量转换效率共同决定，其中能量转换效率是决定转变强度的关键参数。观测推断的能量转换效率为星系形成模型提供了模型独立的基准，对这些模型形成了强约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left: Radial profiles of density (upper-left) and circular velocity (lower-left) for a dark matter halo with mass \(M_{200}=10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) , illustrating the effect of the cusp–core transition. The orange curve represents the NFW profile. The solid and dashed green curves indicate Burkert profiles with mass loss fractions \(f=0\) and \(f=f_{{b}}\) , respectively. The magenta dashed curve indicates the model where the virial radius is recalculated from the halo mass after mass loss, adopting a mass–loss function of \(f=f_{{b}}\) . Upper-right: The dependence of \(\eta\) on \(M_{200}\) . Solid and dashed curves correspond to mass loss fractions of \(f=0\) and \(f=f_{{b}}\) , respectively. Lower-right: The dependence of \(\psi_{{NFW}}\) and \(\psi_{{BKT}}\) on \(M_{200}\) . title: Frequency shift and viewing direction variations in gravitational lensing
summary:
In a gravitational lensing system, the relative transverse velocities of the lens, source, and observer induce a frequency shift in the observed radiation. While this shift is typically negligible in most astrophysical contexts, strategies for its detection have been proposed for both electromagnetic and gravitational waves. This paper provides a rigorous theoretical treatment of the effect, deriving general expressions for the frequency shift within a lensing system embedded in a cosmological spacetime. Our formulation remains valid for arbitrary distances and velocities - including highly relativistic regimes - under any Friedmann-Lemaître-Robertson-Walker metric.
  Expanding upon previous papers on moving lenses, we provide a detailed analysis of frequency effects induced by lenses moving at relativistic speeds. Furthermore, we extend standard lensing theory by deriving an exact formula for the variation in the source's viewing direction. This result is of interest for strongly anisotropic emitters, such as compact binary systems emitting gravitational waves. Finally, we quantify the apparent misalignment between the lens and the source's two images produced by time-delay effects in lens systems moving with high velocity.

title: MIU2Net: weak-lensing mass inversion using deep learning with nested U-structures
summary: One of the primary goals of next-generation gravitational lensing surveys is to measure the large-scale distribution of dark matter, which requires accurate mass inversion to convert weak-lensing shear maps into convergence (kappa) fields. This work develops a mass inversion method tailored for upcoming space missions such as CSST and Euclid, aiming to recover both the mass distribution and the convergence power spectrum with high fidelity. We introduce MIU2Net, a versatile deep-learning framework for kappa-map reconstruction based on the U2-Net architecture. A new loss function is constructed to jointly estimate the convergence field and its frequency-domain energy distribution, effectively balancing optimal mean squared error and optimal power-spectrum recovery. The method incorporates realistic observational effects into shear fields, including shape noise, reduced shear, and complex masks. Under noise levels anticipated for future space-based lensing surveys, MIU2Net recovers the convergence power spectrum with 4% uncertainties up to l approximately 500, significantly outperforming Wiener filtering and MCALens. Beyond two-point statistics, the method accurately reconstructs the convergence distribution, peak centroid, and peak amplitude. Compared to other learning-based approaches such as DeepMass, MIU2Net reduces the root-mean-square error by 5% without smoothing and by 38% with a 1-arcmin smoothing scale. MIU2Net represents a substantial advancement in mass inversion methodology, offering improved accuracy in both RMSE and power-spectrum reconstruction. It provides a promising tool for mapping dark matter environments and large-scale structures in the era of next-generation space lensing surveys.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 下一代引力透镜巡天的主要目标之一是测量暗物质的大尺度分布，这需要精确的质量反演，将弱透镜剪切图转换为收敛（κ）场。本工作开发了一种针对即将到来的空间任务（如CSST和Euclid）量身定制的质量反演方法，旨在高保真地恢复质量分布和收敛功率谱。我们引入了MIU2Net，一个基于U2-Net架构的用于κ图重建的通用深度学习框架。构建了一个新的损失函数，用于联合估计收敛场及其频域能量分布，有效平衡了最优均方误差和最优功率谱恢复。该方法将真实的观测效应（包括形状噪声、约化剪切和复杂掩模）纳入剪切场。在预期的未来空间透镜巡天噪声水平下，MIU2Net以4%的不确定性恢复收敛功率谱（直到l约500），显著优于维纳滤波和MCALens。除了两点统计量外，该方法还能准确重建收敛分布、峰值中心和峰值幅度。与其他基于学习的方法（如DeepMass）相比，MIU2Net在不平滑的情况下将均方根误差降低了5%，在1角分平滑尺度下降低了38%。MIU2Net代表了质量反演方法的重大进展，在均方根误差和功率谱重建方面提供了改进的准确性。它为下一代空间透镜巡天时代绘制暗物质环境和大尺度结构提供了有前景的工具。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：MIU2Net代表了质量反演方法的重大进展，在均方根误差和功率谱重建方面提供了改进的准确性，为下一代空间透镜巡天时代绘制暗物质环境和大尺度结构提供了有前景的工具。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Visual comparison between Truth, our method (MIU 2 Net), and established methods including Kaiser-Squires (KS), Wiener filtering (WF), MCALens (MCA), and SimpleUNet (UNet, based on DeepMass) . Each panel covers a \(1.75\times 1.75\) \(\deg^{2}\) Euclidean patch of sky. The shear maps used for reconstruction have shape noise corresponding to galaxy number density \(n_{g}=20\,{arcmin}^{-2}\) . We visualize in detail the scarlet dashed square region in each panel in Fig. 4 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：真实值、我们的方法（MIU 2 Net）以及已有方法（包括Kaiser-Squires (KS)、维纳滤波 (WF)、MCALens (MCA) 和 SimpleUNet (UNet, 基于 DeepMass)）之间的视觉比较。每个面板覆盖一个 \(1.75\times 1.75\) \(\deg^{2}\) 的欧几里得天区。用于重建的剪切图具有对应于星系数密度 \(n_{g}=20\,{arcmin}^{-2}\) 的形状噪声。我们在图4中详细展示了每个面板中猩红色虚线方框区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: MIU 2 Net structure adapted from U 2 -Net. Figure is drawn based on Fig. \(5\) in Qin et al. ( 2020 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：改编自U 2 -Net的MIU 2 Net结构。该图基于Qin等人 (2020) 中的图 \(5\) 绘制。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Dynamic range for each of the \(500\) convergence reconstructions from MIU 2 Net, KS, WF, MCA, and UNet. Left panel : minimum predicted convergence value \(\min(\bm{\hat{\kappa}})\) against minimum true convergence value \(\min(\bm\kappa)\) for each reconstruction. We also plot the best-fit lines, and the shadings indicate the \(95\%\) confidence intervals for each method. The coloured dots follow the same labelling scheme as in the right panel. The black dashed line is the \(y=x\) line denoting ideal reconstruction. Note that MIU 2 Net can best recover the lower bound, but it systematically overestimates it when \(\min(\bm\kappa)\) is low. KS reconstructions cluster around the lower region far away from truth, because KS is symmetric around \(0\) and does not provide a good estimate for the lower bound. Right panel : scatter plot and best-fit lines for maximum values for each true-prediction pair. The shadings indicate the \(95\%\) confidence intervals for each method. Again, the black dashed line is the \(y=x\) line tracing the ideal reconstruction. It is clear that MIU 2 Net has a slope closest to the ideal and can reliably predict the upper bound of individual convergence maps. Nevertheless, MIU 2 Net systematically underestimates the upper bound. This is expected because an MSE-based estimator is inclined to make blurry, middle-range predictions that smooth out intense spikes. Compared to UNet, which is also an MSE-based estimator, MIU 2 Net more reliably recovers the maximum amplitude. As seen by the larger slope, MIU 2 Net is more inclined to make bold, salient predictions than UNet for larger maximum peaks.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：来自MIU 2 Net、KS、WF、MCA和UNet的 \(500\) 个收敛重建的动态范围。左面板：每个重建的最小预测收敛值 \(\min(\bm{\hat{\kappa}})\) 相对于最小真实收敛值 \(\min(\bm\kappa)\)。我们还绘制了最佳拟合线，阴影表示每种方法的 \(95\%\) 置信区间。彩色点遵循与右面板相同的标记方案。黑色虚线是 \(y=x\) 线，表示理想重建。注意，MIU 2 Net能最好地恢复下界，但当 \(\min(\bm\kappa)\) 较低时，它会系统性地高估它。KS重建聚集在远离真实值的较低区域，因为KS关于 \(0\) 对称，并且不能提供下界的良好估计。右面板：每个真实-预测对最大值的散点图和最佳拟合线。阴影表示每种方法的 \(95\%\) 置信区间。同样，黑色虚线是 \(y=x\) 线，描绘理想重建。很明显，MIU 2 Net的斜率最接近理想值，并且能可靠地预测单个收敛图的上界。尽管如此，MIU 2 Net系统性地低估了上界。这是预期的，因为基于MSE的估计器倾向于做出模糊的、中等范围的预测，从而平滑掉强烈的尖峰。与同样是基于MSE的估计器的UNet相比，MIU 2 Net更可靠地恢复了最大幅度。从更大的斜率可以看出，对于更大的最大峰值，MIU 2 Net比UNet更倾向于做出大胆、显著的预测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Centroid and amplitude recovery from MIU 2 Net, KS, WF, MCA, and UNet for an individual convergence peak. The plotted regions have dimensions \(8.2\times 8.2\,arcmin^{2}\) and correspond to the scarlet dashed square regions in Fig. 1 . The crosses indicate the highest peak in each of the recovered regions. The coordinates above the crosses are in the form \((\Delta x,\Delta y,\kappa_{peak})\) , where \(\Delta x\) and \(\Delta y\) are spatial coordinates of the predicted peak relative to that of the true peak, and \(\kappa_{peak}\) is the peak convergence value. The Full Width at Half Maximum (FWHM) for each peak is shown in the bottom left of each panel. MIU 2 Net best recovers the position, amplitude, and FWHM of the true peak without significant noise . However, MIU 2 Net fails to recover the highly non-Gaussian profile of the true peak, as the reconstruction still exhibits a relatively smoothed profile and a bell-like shape. Note that although KS recovers the central peak with decent accuracy, this is because the central peak has a large convergence value ( \(0.638\) ). For lower convergence values, noise can easily submerge the reconstructed peak.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自MIU 2 Net、KS、WF、MCA和UNet的单个收敛峰的中心和幅度恢复。绘制的区域尺寸为 \(8.2\times 8.2\,arcmin^{2}\)，对应于图1中的猩红色虚线方框区域。十字标记表示每个恢复区域中的最高峰。十字上方的坐标形式为 \((\Delta x,\Delta y,\kappa_{peak})\)，其中 \(\Delta x\) 和 \(\Delta y\) 是预测峰值相对于真实峰值的空间坐标，\(\kappa_{peak}\) 是峰值收敛值。每个峰的半高全宽 (FWHM) 显示在每个面板的左下方。MIU 2 Net在无明显噪声的情况下最好地恢复了真实峰的位置、幅度和FWHM。然而，MIU 2 Net未能恢复真实峰的高度非高斯轮廓，因为重建仍然显示出相对平滑的轮廓和钟形形状。注意，尽管KS以不错的精度恢复了中心峰，这是因为中心峰具有较大的收敛值 ( \(0.638\) )。对于较低的收敛值，噪声很容易淹没重建的峰值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: On the mass-sheet degeneracy. Left panel : for \(500\) reconstructions, we plot the mean \(\langle\bm{\hat{\kappa}}\rangle\) for each of the predicted convergence maps against the mean \(\langle\bm\kappa\rangle\) for each of the true convergence maps. The black dashed line is the \(y=x\) line denoting the ideal recovery of mean convergence. MIU 2 Net reconstructions clearly follow a linear relation whose slope is close to the ideal and has a negligible offset. The blue line and shading indicate the best-fit line for MIU 2 Net and the \(95\%\) confidence interval. Both KS and WF assume \(\langle\bm{\hat{\kappa}}\rangle=0\) , so they overlap on the \(y=0\) line. UNet also exhibits a positive slope, suggesting that deep learning MMSE estimators may utilize the prior information in convergence fields better than other methods. Middle panel : the same as left panel, except now we plot the corrected MIU 2 Net reconstructions with \(\mu_{ms}=1.672\) . The value of \(\mu_{ms}\) is chosen empirically based on the parameters of the best-fit line in the left panel. The best-fit line for corrected MIU 2 Net closely resembles the ideal linear relationship. Right panel : the corrected MIU 2 Net reconstructions with the same scaling factor \(\mu_{ms}=1.672\) for reconstructions using the second cosmology. The corrected mean convergence is still very close to the ideal reconstruction despite the change in cosmology.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：关于质量片简并性。左面板：对于 \(500\) 个重建，我们绘制每个预测收敛图的平均值 \(\langle\bm{\hat{\kappa}}\rangle\) 相对于每个真实收敛图的平均值 \(\langle\bm\kappa\rangle\)。黑色虚线是 \(y=x\) 线，表示平均收敛的理想恢复。MIU 2 Net重建明显遵循一条线性关系，其斜率接近理想值且偏移可忽略。蓝色线和阴影表示MIU 2 Net的最佳拟合线和 \(95\%\) 置信区间。KS和WF都假设 \(\langle\bm{\hat{\kappa}}\rangle=0\)，因此它们在 \(y=0\) 线上重叠。UNet也显示出正斜率，表明深度学习MMSE估计器可能比其他方法更好地利用收敛场中的先验信息。中间面板：与左面板相同，不同之处在于我们现在绘制了经过校正的MIU 2 Net重建，其中 \(\mu_{ms}=1.672\)。\(\mu_{ms}\) 的值是根据左面板中最佳拟合线的参数经验选择的。校正后的MIU 2 Net的最佳拟合线非常接近理想的线性关系。右面板：使用相同的缩放因子 \(\mu_{ms}=1.672\) 对使用第二个宇宙学模型的重建进行校正后的MIU 2 Net重建。尽管宇宙学发生了变化，校正后的平均收敛仍然非常接近理想重建。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Convergence probability density distribution for MIU 2 Net, KS, WF, MCA, and UNet. Left panel : Kernel Density Estimation (KDE) for \(500\) reconstructions. No method appears to recover the true distribution, but the MIU 2 Net distribution follows a log-normal curve similar to the truth. Middle panel : KDE for the same \(500\) reconstructions normalized by the mean and standard deviation of all constituent pixels. The normalized MIU 2 Net closely resembles the true distribution, whereas KS, WF, and MCA are symmetric around \(0\) and do not exhibit any log-normal shape. UNet has a significant amount of pixels around \(\kappa=0\) and does not follow the true distribution. Right panel : a zoom-in for the extended high-end tail for normalized distributions. The \(y\) -axis is in log scale for better visualization. Note that KS and WF fall off rapidly, whereas MIU 2 Net recovers the extended tail with slight overestimation at the high end.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：MIU 2 Net、KS、WF、MCA和UNet的收敛概率密度分布。左面板：\(500\) 个重建的核密度估计 (KDE)。没有方法能恢复真实分布，但MIU 2 Net分布遵循类似于真实值的对数正态曲线。中间面板：相同 \(500\) 个重建的KDE，按所有组成像素的均值和标准差归一化。归一化的MIU 2 Net与真实分布非常相似，而KS、WF和MCA关于 \(0\) 对称，并且不显示任何对数正态形状。UNet在 \(\kappa=0\) 附近有大量像素，并且不遵循真实分布。右面板：归一化分布延伸高端尾部的放大图。\(y\) 轴采用对数刻度以便更好地可视化。注意，KS和WF迅速下降，而MIU 2 Net恢复了延伸的尾部，在高端略有高估。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Power spectrum comparison. Top panel : radial-averaged power spectra for truth, MIU 2 Net, KS, WF, MCA, and UNet . The black dashed line and error bars show the mean and the standard deviation of the true power spectrum for \(500\) realizations. For each of the reconstruction methods, the coloured lines show the mean power spectrum \(\langle P(\boldsymbol{\hat{\kappa}})\rangle\) and the shadings mark the respective standard deviation. The grey vertical dotted line denotes the cutoff \(r_{\max}\) for MIU 2 Net’s RAPS loss, and the grey region to the right corresponds to high frequencies not included in our implementation of RAPS loss. MIU 2 Net power spectrum closely follows the true mean and standard deviation within the range of RAPS loss. The discrepancies between the true power spectrum and all recovered power spectra at the lowest frequency bin can be partly attributed to the imperfect recovery of the DC component, i.e. mean convergence. At high frequencies going into the grey region, the power spectrum for MIU 2 Net rapidly diverges from the truth, as those frequencies are not considered in our loss function. Choosing different cutoff radii \(r_{\max}\) in the frequency domain changes the extent of the grey region. Bottom panel : residual power spectra for each reconstruction method with respect to the truth. The coloured lines correspond to the same label in the top panel, but KS, and UNet are now out of the plot range. The blue band bounds the region \([-0.04,0.04]\) where most of the MIU 2 Net residual power spectrum resides. Note that MIU 2 Net slightly underestimates the power at almost all frequencies, but it always stays within the \(\pm 4\%\) uncertainty band except at the lowest frequency bin.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：功率谱比较。顶部面板：真实值、MIU 2 Net、KS、WF、MCA和UNet的径向平均功率谱。黑色虚线和误差棒显示了 \(500\) 个实现中真实功率谱的均值和标准差。对于每种重建方法，彩色线显示平均功率谱 \(\langle P(\boldsymbol{\hat{\kappa}})\rangle\)，阴影标记相应的标准差。灰色垂直虚线表示MIU 2 Net的RAPS损失的截止值 \(r_{\max}\)，右侧的灰色区域对应于我们RAPS损失实现中未包含的高频。MIU 2 Net功率谱在RAPS损失范围内紧密遵循真实均值和标准差。在最低频率区间，真实功率谱与所有恢复的功率谱之间的差异可部分归因于直流分量（即平均收敛）的不完美恢复。在进入灰色区域的高频处，MIU 2 Net的功率谱迅速偏离真实值，因为这些频率在我们的损失函数中未被考虑。在频域中选择不同的截止半径 \(r_{\max}\) 会改变灰色区域的范围。底部面板：每种重建方法相对于真实值的残差功率谱。彩色线对应于顶部面板中的相同标签，但KS和UNet现在超出了绘图范围。蓝色带界定了区域 \([-0.04,0.04]\)，MIU 2 Net的大部分残差功率谱位于该区域内。注意，MIU 2 Net在几乎所有频率上都略微低估了功率，但除了最低频率区间外，它始终保持在 \(\pm 4\%\) 的不确定度带内。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) under different smoothing conditions for each reconstruction method. Error bars denote one standard deviations. It is clear that MIU 2 Net significantly outperforms all other methods across all smoothing scales.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：每种重建方法在不同平滑条件下的均方根误差 (RMSE)。误差棒表示一个标准差。很明显，MIU 2 Net在所有平滑尺度上都显著优于所有其他方法。

title: Magnetic field morphological diagnostics with ALMA in the G327.29 protocluster: VGT versus dust polarization
summary: Magnetic fields and turbulence may play a key role in the evolution of protoclusters, influencing the formation of dense cores and stars. Here, we examine the morphology of the magnetic fields in the G327.29 protocluster using both the velocity gradient technique (VGT) extracted from molecular line emissions and linear polarization in the dust continuum emission. The VGT analysis is performed using four molecular tracers: DCN (3-2), C18O (2-1), HN13C (3-2), and H13CO+ (3-2) - which probe gas across different density regimes, observed with the ALMA 12 m array. Owing to its sensitivity to gas dynamics, a comparison between VGT and dust polarization provides a powerful probe of the evolutionary processes in massive star-forming regions. From our analysis we reveal a complex magnetic-field structure, shaped by the combined influence of turbulence and gravity. In addition, it also appears that there is a large-scale (beyond the core scale) gravitational infall from the surrounding medium on to the filament and the central densest region. Furthermore, we observe that cores are dominated by a mix of turbulence and gravity. Overall, this work presents, likely for the first time, the application of VGT to a massive protocluster, G327.29, using high-resolution ALMA observations.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次将速度梯度技术（VGT）应用于大质量原星团G327.29，结合分子线发射和尘埃偏振观测，揭示了该区域由湍流和重力共同塑造的复杂磁场结构。
AI.motivation: 磁场和湍流在原星团演化中可能起关键作用，影响致密核和恒星的形成。研究旨在通过比较VGT和尘埃偏振，探索大质量恒星形成区域的演化过程。
AI.method: 使用ALMA 12米阵列观测四种分子示踪剂（DCN、C18O、HN13C、H13CO+）的分子线发射，提取速度梯度技术（VGT）分析磁场形态，并与尘埃连续谱发射的线性偏振观测结果进行比较。
AI.result: 揭示了G327.29原星团复杂的磁场结构，由湍流和重力共同塑造；发现存在从周围介质到纤维状结构和中心最密区域的大尺度引力坍缩；观测到核区由湍流和重力共同主导。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 磁场和湍流可能在原星团的演化中发挥关键作用，影响致密核和恒星的形成。本文利用从分子谱线发射中提取的速度梯度技术（VGT）以及尘埃连续谱发射中的线偏振，研究了G327.29原星团中的磁场形态。VGT分析使用了四种分子示踪物：DCN (3-2)、C18O (2-1)、HN13C (3-2) 和 H13CO+ (3-2)——它们探测不同密度区间的气体，由ALMA 12米阵列观测。由于其对气体动力学的敏感性，VGT与尘埃偏振的比较为大质量恒星形成区域的演化过程提供了有力的探测手段。通过我们的分析，揭示了一个由湍流和引力共同作用形成的复杂磁场结构。此外，似乎还存在一个从周围介质向纤维和中心最致密区域的大尺度（超出核心尺度）引力下落。进一步地，我们观察到核心主要由湍流和引力的混合主导。总体而言，这项工作可能首次将VGT应用于大质量原星团G327.29，使用了高分辨率ALMA观测。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，本研究首次将VGT技术应用于大质量原星团G327.29的高分辨率ALMA观测，VGT与尘埃偏振的比较为探索大质量恒星形成区域的演化过程提供了有力工具。

title: On the role of gravity, turbulence, and the magnetic field in angular momentum transfer within molecular clouds
comment: Submitted to ApJ, 22 pages, 13 figures. Comments are welcome
summary: Observations of molecular structures on scales of $\sim 0.1-50$ pc show that the specific angular momentum ($j$) scales with radius ($R$) as $j\sim R^{3/2}$. We study the effects of turbulence, gravity, and the magnetic field in shaping this scaling, by measuring clump size and specific angular momentum in three SPH simulations of the formation of giant molecular clouds, progressively adding these three ingredients. In each simulation, we define ``full'' and ``reduced'' clump samples, the latter restricted to aspect ratios $A<3$. We find that, in the non-magnetic runs, elongated clumps deviate the most from the \jR\ relation, which is best reproduced by the reduced sample in the gravity+turbulence run. In the purely hydrodynamic case, no dense elongated structures form, suggesting that turbulence alone is insufficient to generate dense filaments, although clumps have $j$ magnitudes consistent with observations. In the gravity+turbulence+magnetic field run, most of the clumps are filamentary, yet the full sample appears to follow the observed \jR\ relation. This result, rather than being a real trend, could be the combination of the increase in $j$ by the filamentary geometry, and its reduction by turbulence inhibition by the magnetic field. Finally, we measure the gravitational, magnetic, pressure-gradient, and hydrodynamic torques (which involve turbulent viscosity) in our clump samples. We find that, in magnitude, the hydrodynamic torques tend to be larger than the rest. This result is consistent with our previous work, where we proposed that gravity drives cloud formation and contraction, while turbulence redistributes angular momentum through fluid-parcel exchanges.

AI.tldr: 研究通过SPH模拟探讨分子云形成中湍流、重力和磁场对特定角动量-半径关系j∼R^{3/2}的影响，发现磁场对湍流的抑制与细长几何结构共同影响该关系，流体动力扭矩在角动量再分布中起主要作用。
AI.motivation: 观测显示分子结构在0.1-50 pc尺度上存在特定角动量j与半径R的j∼R^{3/2}标度关系，研究旨在探究湍流、重力和磁场如何共同塑造这一关系。
AI.method: 使用SPH模拟巨型分子云形成，逐步添加湍流、重力和磁场三种物理成分。定义"完整"和"缩减"团块样本（后者限制纵横比A<3），测量团块大小和特定角动量，并分析重力、磁场、压力梯度和流体动力扭矩。
AI.result: 1) 非磁模拟中，细长团块偏离j-R关系最明显，重力+湍流模拟的缩减样本最能再现观测关系；2) 纯流体动力学模拟无法形成致密细长结构；3) 重力+湍流+磁场模拟中，多数团块呈细长状，但完整样本似乎遵循观测关系，这可能是细长几何增加j与磁场抑制湍流减少j的综合效应；4) 流体动力扭矩在幅度上通常大于其他扭矩。
AI.conclusion: 重力驱动云的形成和收缩，而湍流通过流体包裹交换重新分布角动量。磁场对湍流的抑制与细长几何结构的共同作用可能解释了观测到的j-R关系，而非真实的物理趋势。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 对尺度约为0.1-50 pc的分子结构的观测表明，比角动量（j）随半径（R）的标度关系为j∼R^{3/2}。我们通过测量三个逐步添加湍流、引力和磁场这三种因素的巨分子云形成SPH模拟中的团块大小和比角动量，研究了这些因素在形成该标度关系中的作用。在每个模拟中，我们定义了“全样本”和“缩减样本”，后者仅限于长宽比A<3的团块。我们发现，在非磁化模拟中，细长团块偏离j-R关系最远，而该关系在引力+湍流模拟的缩减样本中得到了最佳再现。在纯流体动力学情况下，没有形成致密的细长结构，这表明仅靠湍流不足以产生致密纤维，尽管团块的j量级与观测一致。在引力+湍流+磁场模拟中，大多数团块呈纤维状，但全样本似乎遵循观测到的j-R关系。这一结果可能并非真实的趋势，而是细长几何结构导致j增加以及磁场抑制湍流导致j减少的共同作用。最后，我们测量了团块样本中的引力、磁力、压力梯度和流体动力学力矩（涉及湍流粘性）。我们发现，在量级上，流体动力学力矩往往大于其他力矩。这一结果与我们之前的工作一致，其中我们提出引力驱动云的形成和收缩，而湍流通过流体包裹交换重新分布角动量。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：引力驱动云的形成和收缩，而湍流通过流体包裹交换重新分布角动量。磁场对湍流的抑制与细长几何结构的共同作用可能解释了观测到的j-R关系，而非真实的物理趋势。

title: Tracing Cosmological Signature with Doppler Lensing: Insights from Cosmological Simulations
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables, Accepted for publication in Phys. Lett. B
summary: Doppler lensing, a relativistic effect resulting from the peculiar velocities of galaxies along the line of sight, provides insight into the large-scale structure of the Universe. Relativistic simulations are essential for modeling Doppler lensing because they incorporate gravity and motion in spacetime. We compare two relativistic $N$-body simulation frameworks, $\texttt{GEVOLUTION}$ and $\texttt{SCREENING}$, to calculate Doppler lensing convergence in cosmic voids of different sizes and halos of different masses. Our analysis reveals scale-dependent performance: $\texttt{SCREENING}$ shows larger differences in small voids (radius range: 15--25 Mpc/h) with a mean absolute relative difference of 38.5\%, due to linearized dynamics failing in nonlinear regimes. Medium voids (25--35 Mpc/h) show better agreement (9.5\% mean difference). For large voids (35--45 Mpc/h), $\texttt{SCREENING}$ exhibits intermediate differences (16.9\% mean difference) with central instabilities. Moreover, our Doppler convergence analysis with massive halos ($10^{11.5}$--$10^{14} {~h^{-1}\mathrm{M}_\odot}$) demonstrates excellent consistency (1.6--3.6\% mean difference). These findings provide clear guidance for simulation choice: $\texttt{GEVOLUTION}$ is recommended for precision studies critical to $Λ$CDM or modified gravity tests, while $\texttt{SCREENING}$ offers a computationally efficient alternative for relativistic treatments with large catalogs of voids and halos, assisting future astrophysical surveys.

AI.tldr: 比较GEVOLUTION和SCREENING两个相对论性N体模拟框架在计算宇宙空洞和暗晕的多普勒透镜效应时的性能差异，为不同研究需求提供模拟选择指导。
AI.motivation: 多普勒透镜效应作为由星系沿视线方向本动速度产生的相对论效应，能为宇宙大尺度结构提供重要信息。相对论性模拟对于准确建模多普勒透镜效应至关重要，因为它能同时纳入时空中的引力和运动效应。
AI.method: 使用GEVOLUTION和SCREENING两个相对论性N体模拟框架，计算不同尺寸宇宙空洞（小：15-25 Mpc/h，中：25-35 Mpc/h，大：35-45 Mpc/h）和不同质量暗晕（10^{11.5}-10^{14} h^{-1}M_⊙）的多普勒透镜收敛效应，并进行比较分析。
AI.result: 1. 小空洞（15-25 Mpc/h）：SCREENING表现差异较大，平均绝对相对差异达38.5%，线性化动力学在非线性区域失效；2. 中空洞（25-35 Mpc/h）：一致性较好，平均差异9.5%；3. 大空洞（35-45 Mpc/h）：SCREENING表现中等差异（16.9%平均差异），存在中心不稳定性；4. 大质量暗晕（10^{11.5}-10^{14} h^{-1}M_⊙）：两个框架表现高度一致，平均差异仅1.6-3.6%。
AI.conclusion: 为不同研究需求提供明确的模拟选择指导：对于ΛCDM或修改引力理论的精确研究，推荐使用GEVOLUTION；而对于需要处理大量空洞和暗晕目录的相对论性处理，SCREENING提供计算效率更高的替代方案，有助于未来天体物理巡天研究。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 多普勒透镜效应是由星系沿视线方向的视速度引起的相对论效应，为研究宇宙大尺度结构提供了重要视角。相对论模拟对于建模多普勒透镜至关重要，因为它们包含了时空中的引力和运动。我们比较了两个相对论性N体模拟框架——\texttt{GEVOLUTION}和\texttt{SCREENING}，以计算不同大小的宇宙空洞和不同质量的暗晕中的多普勒透镜会聚。我们的分析揭示了尺度依赖的性能：在小型空洞（半径范围：15–25 Mpc/h）中，\texttt{SCREENING}显示出较大的差异，平均绝对相对差异为38.5%，这是由于线性化动力学在非线性区域失效。中型空洞（25–35 Mpc/h）表现出更好的一致性（平均差异9.5%）。对于大型空洞（35–45 Mpc/h），\texttt{SCREENING}显示出中等差异（平均差异16.9%），并伴有中心不稳定性。此外，我们对大质量暗晕（$10^{11.5}$–$10^{14} {~h^{-1}\mathrm{M}_\odot}$）的多普勒会聚分析显示出极好的一致性（平均差异1.6–3.6%）。这些发现为模拟选择提供了明确指导：对于对ΛCDM或修改引力理论测试至关重要的精确研究，推荐使用\texttt{GEVOLUTION}；而\texttt{SCREENING}则为处理大量空洞和暗晕目录的相对论性处理提供了一种计算高效的替代方案，有助于未来的天体物理巡天研究。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：为不同研究需求提供明确的模拟选择指导——对于ΛCDM或修改引力理论的精确研究，推荐使用GEVOLUTION；而对于需要处理大量空洞和暗晕目录的相对论性处理，SCREENING提供计算效率更高的替代方案，有助于未来天体物理巡天研究。

title: A Quenched and Relatively Isolated Dwarf Galaxy in the Local Volume
comment: 18 pages, 10 figures, accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: An increasing number of discoveries of isolated and quenched dwarf galaxies are challenging the idea that the present-day local environment of low-mass systems is the main determinant of their quenching. We present new Hubble Space Telescope (HST) data of one such system, the dwarf galaxy Canes Venatici C (CVn C). CVn C is a low-mass (3.4(+4.2-2.6)*10^6 M_sun) galaxy with a Tip of the Red Giant Branch distance of 8.43(+0.47-0.32) Mpc determined from the resolved stars in the HST imaging, which we also use to derive CVn C's structural parameters. CVn C's distance places CVn C in the Local Volume and in an isolated environment with the most tidally influential L* galaxy > 5Rvir away. Additional constraints from the HST color-magnitude diagram, archival Far-Ultraviolet (FUV), and neutral hydrogen (HI) data show that CVn C is quenched, with no evidence of star formation in the last 100 Myr and no detectable gas (MHI < 1.5*10^6 M_sun). Circumstantial evidence suggests that CVn C may have quenched via past interactions with the L* galaxy NGC 4631 (L_K = 10^10.4 L_sun), and was possibly sent on an extreme backsplash orbit by the tidal dissolution of a subhalo group. However, other quenching mechanisms-such as stripping via the cosmic web-cannot be ruled out. CVn C adds to the growing number of quenched dwarf galaxies in under-dense environments, a population that will be critical to defining the mass and environment regimes in which different quenching mechanisms operate.

AI.tldr: 研究发现孤立矮星系CVn C在低密度环境中停止恒星形成，挑战了星系淬灭主要取决于当前局部环境的传统观点。
AI.motivation: 越来越多的孤立且停止恒星形成的矮星系的发现，挑战了低质量系统当前局部环境是其主要淬灭决定因素的观点。需要研究这些系统以理解不同淬灭机制的作用范围。
AI.method: 使用哈勃太空望远镜数据测量CVn C的距离和结构参数，结合颜色-星等图、远紫外和中性氢数据，分析其恒星形成历史和气体含量。
AI.result: CVn C是一个低质量(3.4×10^6 M_sun)矮星系，距离8.43 Mpc，处于孤立环境。它已停止恒星形成至少1亿年，没有可探测的气体(MHI < 1.5×10^6 M_sun)。
AI.conclusion: CVn C可能通过过去与L*星系NGC 4631的相互作用而淬灭，或是宇宙网剥离的结果。这类低密度环境中的淬灭矮星系对于定义不同淬灭机制的作用范围至关重要。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 越来越多的孤立且淬灭的矮星系的发现正在挑战低质量系统当前的局域环境是其淬灭主要决定因素的观点。我们展示了其中一个系统——猎犬座C矮星系（CVn C）的新哈勃空间望远镜（HST）数据。CVn C是一个低质量（3.4(+4.2-2.6)*10^6 M_sun）星系，其红巨星支尖点距离为8.43(+0.47-0.32) Mpc，由HST成像中的分解恒星确定，我们还利用这些数据推导了CVn C的结构参数。CVn C的距离将其置于本动体积内，且处于孤立环境中，最具潮汐影响的L*星系距离超过5Rvir。来自HST颜色-星等图、档案远紫外（FUV）和中性质子（HI）数据的额外约束表明，CVn C已淬灭，在过去100 Myr内没有恒星形成迹象，且未探测到气体（M_HI < 1.5*10^6 M_sun）。间接证据表明，CVn C可能通过与L*星系NGC 4631（L_K = 10^10.4 L_sun）的过去相互作用而淬灭，并可能因亚晕群的潮汐瓦解而被置于极端的回溅轨道上。然而，其他淬灭机制——例如通过宇宙网剥离——也无法排除。CVn C增加了低密度环境中淬灭矮星系的数量，这一群体对于定义不同淬灭机制运作的质量和环境范围至关重要。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，CVn C可能通过过去与L*星系NGC 4631的相互作用而淬灭，或是宇宙网剥离的结果。这类低密度环境中的淬灭矮星系对于定义不同淬灭机制的作用范围至关重要。

Open circles show the sources which were found to have a high ( \(>65\%\) ) probability of being a contaminant (see Section III.2 ). The majority of CVn C’s stars are consistent with ages \(>1\) Gyr. However, we are unable to rule out a small amount of late-time ( \(>100\) Myr) star formation.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：CVn C中恒星的消光校正CMD。叠加的是来自PARSEC库（Bressan et al.，2012）的等时线，年龄分别为（从左到右）100 Myr、250 Myr、500 Myr、1 Gyr、2 Gyr、5 Gyr和10 Gyr，金属丰度为[M/H]= \(-\) 0.6。空心圆显示被发现具有高（\(>65\%\)）概率为污染物的源（见第III.2节）。CVn C的大部分恒星与年龄\(>1\) Gyr一致。然而，我们无法排除少量晚期（\(>100\) Myr）恒星形成的可能性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 10 : The location of CVn C in Supergalactic coordinates with all identified neighboring galaxies within a physical distance of 1.5 Mpc, indicated by the large light blue circle. The size of the red circles represent the virial radii of each neighbor, while the virial radius of CVn C is shown with a dark blue circle. The location of CVn C’s most influential \(L_{\star}\) neighbor (NGC 4631) is annotated and marked with a black outline. CVn C is outside the virial radius of all neighbors, and is located at a 3D separation of \(\sim 1.3\) Mpc ( \(>5R_{\text{vir}}\) ) from NGC 4631.
figures.caption_zh: 图10：CVn C在超星系坐标中的位置，以及物理距离1.5 Mpc内所有已识别的邻近星系，由大的浅蓝色圆圈表示。红色圆圈的大小代表每个邻居的维里半径，而CVn C的维里半径以深蓝色圆圈显示。CVn C最具影响力的\(L_{\star}\)邻居（NGC 4631）的位置已标注并以黑色轮廓标出。CVn C位于所有邻居的维里半径之外，与NGC 4631的三维分离距离为\(\sim 1.3\) Mpc（\(>5R_{\text{vir}}\)）。
